title: Draftelier AI - The Ultimate Atelier Prompt Archive
subtitle: 法医级时装手稿提示词库 (16 Iconic Designers)
global_negative_prompt: runway photo, editorial photo, magazine scan, celebrity likeness, public figure likeness, screenshot, phone UI, watermark, signature, logo, brand label, house name text, designer name text, typography, e-commerce product photo, photorealism, 3D render, CGI, plastic skin, muddy anatomy, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, distorted face, background clutter, cast shadow, props, scenery

training_guidance.caption_pattern: style_token, fashion illustration type, medium, stroke language, silhouette cue, page mood
use_notes: Put the style token at the start of every LoRA caption for stronger concept binding.
Keep captions concrete: medium first, then strokes, then silhouette logic, then atmosphere.
Use the master prompt for inference or synthetic augmentation; use the short caption for dataset tagging.
Avoid brand logos, house names, signatures, and visible typography in generated outputs.
If training on mixed-source archives, exclude runway photos, copyrighted scans, screenshots, and celebrity/editorial imagery without clear reuse rights.
training_guidance.trigger_word_strategy_cn: 建议把每条 master prompt 的第一句话作为该风格 LoRA 的核心触发词；例如 “Masterpiece dark poise fashion illustration.” 可直接作为 McQueen 风格的主触发句。
training_guidance.trigger_word_strategy_en: Use the first sentence of each master prompt as the core LoRA trigger phrase for that style.
training_guidance.material_control_notes_cn: 这些 prompt 把 correction-fluid、charcoal、xerox texture、metallic marker 等材质词写得非常具体，目的就是把模型从“无聊的写实脸”强行拉回到 2D 纸绘、编辑页、档案手稿的生成逻辑。
training_guidance.material_control_notes_en: Specific material terms like correction-fluid, charcoal, xerox texture, and metallic marker help force the model toward a 2D illustrated editorial page instead of generic polished realism.
usage_tips_cn: LoRA 微调时，优先把 trigger phrase 放在 caption 开头，再接 medium、strokes、silhouette、vibe。
推理时若结果过于写实，可提高 medium 相关短语权重，并追加 paper ground、fashion illustration、editorial sketch 等 2D 约束。
如果模型开始生成品牌字样、签名或水印，保留现有 negative prompt，并额外提高 no typography 类约束。

styles.research_notes_cn: 致敬 1950 年代 Dior 御用插画大师 Rene Gruau。强调沙龙里的从容优雅、New Look 式沙漏轮廓，以及水彩半透明的轻柔纸面感。
styles.medium: highly expressive, delicate graphite pencil construction lines with a translucent, soft watercolor wash
styles.strokes: sweeping elegant curves, poised line control, polished vintage archival sketching
styles.vibe: 1950s salon poise, refined couture restraint, elegant and effortless
styles.caption_short: paris_new_look, Parisian haute couture fashion illustration, delicate graphite construction lines, translucent watercolor wash, poised New Look hourglass silhouette, polished 1950s atelier paper sketch
styles.master_prompt: Masterpiece Parisian haute couture fashion illustration. Medium: highly expressive, delicate graphite pencil construction lines with a translucent, soft watercolor wash. Focus on poised hourglass silhouette, sweeping elegant curves, and polished vintage archival sketching techniques. Authentic 1950s atelier drawing style, elegant and effortless on a clean paper ground.

styles.trigger_phrase: Masterpiece Parisian haute couture fashion illustration.

styles.research_notes_cn: Balenciaga 被称为“时装界的建筑师”。重点不是装饰，而是内部结构、空间控制、茧型和布袋裙等雕塑化体量关系。
styles.medium: cool, precise graphite contour lines with restrained, flat gouache wash
styles.strokes: measured contours, structural tailoring cues, bold negative space control
styles.vibe: cerebral, sculptural, disciplined, quiet atelier precision
styles.caption_short: architectural_volume, sculptural atelier fashion illustration, precise graphite contour lines, restrained gouache wash, cocoon and sack-dress volume, clean negative space, disciplined croquis
styles.master_prompt: Masterpiece sculptural atelier fashion illustration. Medium: cool, precise graphite contour lines with restrained, flat gouache wash. Focus on architectural volume, minimalist structural tailoring cues, clean bold negative space, and disciplined fashion croquis techniques. Cerebral and structured.

styles.strokes: eccentric drafting gestures, trompe l'oeil detailing, sharp decorative contrast
styles.vibe: avant-garde couture energy, poetic surreal tension, bold and dramatic

styles.strokes: fast croquis sweeps, abrupt marker accents, live-fitting spontaneity
styles.vibe: backstage editorial energy, messy confidence, spontaneous and chic

styles.research_notes_cn: Vivienne Westwood 的手稿语言来自 DIY 拼贴、无政府主义、英伦古典与破坏性剪裁的碰撞，尤其是格纹、粗糙笔线与历史服装错位。

styles.strokes: disrupted historic drape, subverted tailoring, tartan and tweed notation, raw scratched marks
styles.vibe: rebellious, DIY, aristocratic mischief, punk editorial attitude

styles.strokes: origami fold logic, kinetic drape motion, sculptural fabric geometry

styles.medium: crisp, ruler-straight geometric ink lines with minimal flat vector-like marker wash
styles.strokes: immaculate A-line geometry, strict line discipline, optical white-space control
styles.vibe: mod futurist, polished, optimistic retro-future, immaculate precision

styles.research_notes_cn: Paco Rabanne 的服装像工业组装而非缝纫，关键是锁环、金属片、锁子甲和硬反光边缘，画面应像一张未来工业图纸。

styles.strokes: chainmail and disc construction detail, hard-edged assembly cues, metallic surface rhythm
styles.vibe: industrial couture, space-age hardness, cold shine, modular precision
